name: inv3-verdict-channel-not-text
notes: Verdicts derive ONLY from the runner's verdict channel, never from output text. 'pass emits fail text' prints AssertionError-looking text yet PASSES; it must not be classified red, so its name never appears in the report. 'fail emits pass text' prints reassuring text yet FAILS; it must be red (still_fail_unchanged). Green->red concealment via console text is structurally impossible.
